appliedUpdates.description: Added ToolLayer::Builtin parameter to register() calls in register_web_search_tools function
Added ToolLayer::Builtin parameter to register() calls in permission denial test functions

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about ToolRegistry::register API requiring ToolLayer parameter. When register() was updated from 2 to 3 arguments, several test files and register_web_search_tools() weren't updated.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features perm-denial-surfacing and tools-registry-layers both needed fixes for the new register API
